CustomField.description: Expected-to-date amount still unpaid on a pledge: SUM of Payment Amount where Paid=false, Written Off=false, and Scheduled Date <= today. Populated by DLRS (Realtime + nightly Full Calculate). Added for JSI-82. Author: Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Amount that should have been received by today per the payment schedule but has not yet been paid.
CustomField.label: Amount Due To Date
